title: Grilled Medjool Dates with Citrus and Almonds
description: A sweet and tangy dessert made with caramelized medjool dates, citrus zest, and crunchy almonds.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium heat.
Cut the dates in half lengthwise and remove the pits.
Grill the dates for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until caramelized.
Zest the oranges and juice them.
In a small bowl, whisk together the honey, orange juice, and lemon juice.
Brush the mixture onto the grilled dates.
Sprinkle the sliced almonds over the dates.
Serve warm or at room temperature.
